title: micromeria palmensis
intro: Micromeria palmensis, also known as Tenerife pennyroyal, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Micromeria palmensis include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and stomach cramps, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Micromeria palmensis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to alleviate menstrual cramps and other women's health issues.
